description: API keys, tokens, secrets, URLs, and PII patterns. block_type hard = blocked before model, soft = redacted with warning but passed to model post-redaction.

INDIA.description: India-specific PII patterns governed by DPDPA 2023, IT Act 2000, Aadhaar Act 2016

patterns.description: PAN: 5 letters (4th is entity type) + 4 digits + 1 check letter
DL: State code (2 letters) + RTO code (2 digits) + year (4) + serial (7)
GSTIN: 2 state code + PAN (10) + entity + Z + check
Indian mobile: optional +91, starts with 6-9, 10 digits

USA.description: US-specific PII patterns governed by CCPA, HIPAA, GLBA, FERPA

patterns.description: Labeled US driver's license (format varies by state)

UK.description: UK-specific PII patterns governed by UK GDPR, Data Protection Act 2018

patterns.description: NI Number: 2 letters + 6 digits + 1 suffix letter (A-D)
UK phone: +44/0 prefix, mobile or landline

EUROPE.description: EU/EEA PII patterns governed by GDPR

patterns.description: IBAN: country code (2) + check digits (2) + up to 30 BBAN chars
EU VAT: 2-letter country prefix + 8-12 alphanumeric chars

AUSTRALIA.description: Australia-specific PII governed by Privacy Act 1988, APPs

GLOBAL.description: Universal PII patterns applied regardless of region

patterns.description: Labeled date of birth in common formats
Labeled person name: requires context label before name
Long-term IAM access key: AKIA + 16 uppercase alphanumeric
Short-term STS session key: ASIA + 16 uppercase alphanumeric
AWS managed policy ID: ANPA prefix

entities.name: AWS_SECRET_KEY
entities.block_reason: Possible AWS Secret Access Key detected

patterns.description: Labeled AWS secret key: 40-char base64-ish string
AWS MWS key: amzn.mws. + UUID format

entities.name: GCP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT
entities.block_reason: Google Cloud service account credential detected

patterns.description: Google OAuth2 access token: ya29. prefix

entities.name: AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET
entities.description: Azure AD client secret / app password

patterns.description: Azure Storage connection string with AccountKey
Azure SAS token query string parameters
DigitalOcean personal access token: dop_v1_ + 64 hex chars
Labeled DO Spaces key: 20 uppercase alphanumeric

entities.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY
entities.description: Cloudflare Global API key or API token

patterns.description: Labeled Heroku API key: UUID format
Anthropic API key: sk-ant- or sk-ant-api03- prefix, 93+ chars total
OpenAI legacy key: sk- + 48 alphanumeric chars
OpenAI service account key: sk-svcacct- prefix
HuggingFace user access token: hf_ prefix + 34+ chars
Labeled Mistral API key: 32+ alphanumeric chars
Replicate API token: r8_ + 37 alphanumeric chars

entities.name: STABILITY_AI_KEY
entities.block_reason: Possible Stability AI API key detected

patterns.description: Labeled Together AI key: 64 hex chars
Perplexity API key: pplx- + 48 alphanumeric chars
Groq API key: gsk_ + 52 alphanumeric chars
Stripe live secret key: sk_live_ prefix
Stripe test secret key: sk_test_ prefix
Stripe live publishable key: pk_live_ prefix
Stripe test publishable key: pk_test_ prefix
Stripe live restricted key: rk_live_ prefix
Stripe test restricted key: rk_test_ prefix
Stripe webhook signing secret: whsec_ prefix
Labeled PayPal client ID or secret

entities.name: SQUARE_KEY
entities.description: Square payment API key / access token

patterns.description: Square production access token: EAAA prefix
Square application key: sq0 + 3 letters prefix

entities.name: SHOPIFY_KEY
entities.description: Shopify API key or access token

patterns.description: Shopify custom app access token: shpca_ prefix
Shopify partner API token: shppa_ prefix
Labeled Paytm merchant key: 16-32 alphanumeric chars
Labeled Cashfree app ID or secret key
Labeled PhonePe merchant key or salt key
Adyen API key: AQE prefix + base64 encoded key
Paystack live secret key: sk_live_ + 40 chars
Paystack test secret key: sk_test_ + 40 chars

entities.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
entities.description: GitHub personal access token or app token

patterns.description: GitHub personal access token (classic): ghp_ prefix

entities.name: GITLAB_TOKEN
entities.description: GitLab personal or project access token

patterns.description: GitLab personal access token: glpat- + 20 chars
GitLab project trigger token: glptt- prefix

entities.name: BITBUCKET_TOKEN
entities.description: Bitbucket app password or access token

patterns.description: Labeled Bitbucket app password or token

entities.name: SLACK_TOKEN
entities.description: Slack bot, user, or app token

patterns.description: Slack app config token: xapp- prefix
Discord bot token: base64 user ID + dot + timestamp + dot + HMAC
Telegram bot token: numeric bot ID + colon + 35-char secret

entities.name: TWILIO_KEY
entities.description: Twilio Account SID, Auth Token, or API key

patterns.description: Twilio Account SID: AC + 32 hex chars
Twilio API Key SID: SK + 32 hex chars
Labeled Twilio Auth Token: 32 hex chars
SendGrid API key: SG. + 22 chars + dot + 43 chars
Mailgun private API key: key- + 32 hex chars

entities.name: POSTMARK_KEY
entities.description: Postmark server or account API token

patterns.description: npm access token (new format): npm_ + 36 chars
npm token in .npmrc or env var
PyPI API token: pypi- prefix + 50+ chars
Labeled Atlassian/Jira/Confluence API token: 24 alphanumeric chars
Labeled Datadog API key: 32 hex chars
Labeled Datadog application key: 40 hex chars

entities.name: NEW_RELIC_KEY
entities.description: New Relic API or license key

patterns.description: New Relic NerdGraph API token: NRNT- prefix
Labeled New Relic license key: 40 alphanumeric chars
Firebase Cloud Messaging server key: AAAA prefix + 7 chars + colon + 140 chars
JWT: three base64url segments, first two start with eyJ (JSON header/payload)
PEM private key header: RSA, EC, DSA, OpenSSH, or generic

entities.name: GENERIC_SECRET_ENV
entities.description: Generic secret or password in environment variable / config
entities.block_reason: Possible secret or password in config

patterns.description: Generic labeled secret/password assignment in config or env (soft — key names are common)
Bitcoin P2PKH / P2SH address: starts with 1 or 3, 26-35 chars (Base58Check)
Bitcoin bech32 (native SegWit) address: bc1 prefix

entities.name: CRYPTO_PRIVATE_KEY
entities.description: Raw cryptocurrency private key (hex or WIF)

patterns.description: Bitcoin WIF private key: starts with 5 (uncompressed) or K/L (compressed)
BIP-39 seed phrase: 12-24 known BIP-39 wordlist words in sequence (partial wordlist — a words only as anchor; extend wordlist for production)
Labeled seed phrase: 12-24 lowercase words following a known label
Database/service connection string with embedded credentials

entities.name: URL_WITH_API_KEY_PARAM
entities.description: URL with API key in query string
entities.block_reason: URL with API key query parameter detected

patterns.description: URL with api_key / token / access_token / auth_token / secret in query param

entities.name: INTERNAL_URL
entities.description: Internal / private network URL or IP endpoint
entities.block_reason: Possible internal network URL or endpoint

patterns.description: URL pointing to RFC1918 / loopback address
URL with internal hostname keywords (localhost, internal, intranet, corp, local, dev, staging, test)
Generic public HTTP/HTTPS URL — soft block, high FP intentional
Microsoft Teams / Outlook incoming webhook URL
ngrok tunnel URL (often exposes internal services)

entities.name: S3_BUCKET_URL
entities.description: AWS S3 or compatible bucket URL

patterns.description: AWS S3 bucket URL (path-style or virtual-hosted)

CARD_NUMBERS.description: Credit and debit card number patterns by network/issuer. All issuer-specific patterns are hard block. Generic fallback is soft. Luhn checksum should be applied downstream.

patterns.description: Mastercard classic BIN range 51-55: 16 digits continuous
Mastercard new BIN range 2221-2720: 16 digits continuous
Labeled Mastercard number (classic and new BIN)
Amex alternate grouping 4-4-4-3 (seen in some UIs)
Discover China UnionPay co-branded range 622126-622925: 16 digits

entities.name: JCB
entities.description: JCB credit card (Japan, widely accepted in Asia)

patterns.description: Maestro continuous: known BIN prefixes + 8-15 more digits (12-19 total)

entities.name: GENERIC_CARD_NUMBER
entities.description: Generic 13-19 digit card number (labeled context fallback for unknown issuers)

patterns.description: Labeled generic card / PAN: covers any issuer not matched above
Generic 4-4-4-4 grouped 16-digit number (Luhn validation required downstream to confirm)
